description: Statistical table with raw data values and computed columns. Used as data source for chart expressions (barchart, linechart, scatter, piechart, cdfchart). Standalone container using at().
utility: Create a statistical data table with computed columns

arguments.name: statcolumn
arguments.description: One or more computed column definitions

examples.expression: T = stattable(at(2,4), values("10","20","30","40","50"), statcolumn(type(cumulativesum)), statcolumn(type(percentage)), header("Value", "Cumulative", "Pct"))
